query_title: Tintin and the Lake of Sharks

recommendations.title: Richie Rich's Christmas Wish
recommendations.overview: After getting blamed for spoiling Christmas, the richest kid in the world wishes he'd never been born. Unfortunately, a wishing machine, invented by professor Keenbean, picked up the wish and made it come true. Now Richie finds himself in a parallel

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: The King and the Mockingbird
recommendations.overview: A young shepherdess and a chimneysweep plan to get married and escape the clutches of a tyrannical king in love with her, assisted by the guile of a cheeky mockingbird, the king's archenemy.

recommendations.title: The Railway Children Return
recommendations.overview: Follow a group of children who are evacuated to a Yorkshire village during the Second World War, where they encounter a young soldier who, like them, is far away from home.

recommendations.title: A Time for Drunken Horses
recommendations.overview: After their father dies, a family of five children are forced to survive on their own in a Kurdish village on the border of Iran and Iraq.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time, There Lived a Dog
recommendations.overview: Based on the Ukrainian folktale, the old dog of a village family is not as keen as he once was, and is sent away after he fails to guard their house during a robbery. In the woods, he meets the wolf he protected his masters against long ago, who deci

recommendations.title: Green Snake
recommendations.overview: While trying to free her sister from Fahai's clutches, Xiao Qing winds up in a dystopian city and meets a mysterious man who can't recall his past life.

recommendations.title: Piper
recommendations.overview: A mother bird tries to teach her little one how to find food by herself. In the process, she encounters a traumatic experience that she must overcome in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty
